message:
feat(service): add 14 integration tests for middleware layering stack (bd-z1w4)

Tests cover: layer ordering (inner-first/outer-first), call dispatch
order, functional composition with multiply layers, backpressure
propagation through stacks, error propagation, ServiceBuilder
end-to-end composition, deep nesting (4 layers), identity
transparency, and readiness state propagation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
